name: Cherries'n' Cream Patty Shells
recipeIngredient: 1 package Pepperidge Farm Patty Shells, Or
1 package Pepperidge Farm Mini Patty Shells, 269G Size
19 oz Cherry or Blueberry Pie Filling
recipeInstructions:
1. Bake either kind of patty shells according to package directions.
2. Use a fork to remove center tops and soft pastry underneath. Cool.
3. Divide Creamy Orange Filling among pastry shells.
4. Spoon pie filling over Creamy Orange Filling.
5. Dust with icing sugar.
6. Serve immediately. Makes 6 regular or 24 small desserts.
Creamy Orange Filling:
1. Beat together all items except the whipping cream until light.
2. Whip the whipping cream and fold it in.
